identity.CLIENT_EVENT_DESCRIPTION:
Where Champions Are Made.

3 days. Full regulation games. MVP winners every single game.

This isn't practice. This is where your athlete proves they belong.

5U-14U athletes. Full regulation games. Professional coaching from Coach Kei and Coach Lee. Every player gets real game time. Every game crowns an MVP.

Your kid doesn't need more participation trophies. They need reps against real competition.

June 26-28. Central Florida. 2 games guaranteed. Call-out games welcome.

What makes this different: Real games. Real competition. Real coaches who've been there. We don't do fluff - just football and results. Your athlete plays, competes, and improves. Period.

tiers.name: Day Pass
tiers.description: Single day access. Full regulation games. MVP opportunities.

tiers.name: Weekend Pass
tiers.description: All 3 days. More games, more competition, more growth. Save $8.

tiers.name: VIP Day Pass
tiers.description: Reserved seating. Watch your athlete dominate in comfort. Premium viewing guaranteed.

tiers.name: VIP Weekend Pass
tiers.description: Reserved seats all weekend. The best view for the best parents. Premium everything.

additional_copy.subheadline: 3 days. Full regulation games. MVP winners every single game.
additional_copy.what_to_bring: Cleats and mouthguard, Water bottle, Game-ready attitude, Parent ID for check-in
additional_copy.parking_info: Free parking on-site. Arrive 30 minutes early for registration.
additional_copy.social_proof: Best showcase in Central Florida. My son played 4 games and came back a different player. - Parent, 2025 Showcase
additional_copy.urgency_trigger: $50 to lock in. Price goes up June 1st. Don't wait.

faq.a: 5U through 14U. If your kid can play, they're in.
Minimum 2 games. Most athletes play 3-4 depending on bracket size.

faq.q: What if my athlete wants more competition?
faq.a: Call-out games are welcome. Bring it.

faq.q: Do we get an MVP every game?
faq.a: Yes. Every single game has an MVP. Your athlete can earn it.
Reserved seating with the best views. Skip the bleacher scramble.
